my-java-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
my-java-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 language rules, preventing the use of Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities on a JDK 21 target.

my-java-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
my-java-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not support the --release flag or Java 21 bytecode generation correctly, leading to build failures or incorrect class files.

my-java-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace explicit source/target configuration with the release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
my-java-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source and target tags is deprecated in favor of the release flag for modern Java versions; failing to switch may result in warnings or incorrect module path handling in newer JDKs.
